prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM L74 455ci (7.4L) big-block V8** with forged internals: Manley forged crankshaft (4.25" stroke), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE forged pistons (10.5:1 compression). Pair with a **Holley Dominator 1050 CFM carburetor** and **Edelbrock Performer RPM intake manifold** for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via **ProCharger F-1X centrifugal supercharger** (12 psi boost) with a custom intercooler setup using **Vortech air-to-water intercooler core** and **Moroso coolant reservoir**. Supporting mods include **ARP head studs** and **Fel-Pro MLS head gaskets** to handle increased cylinder pressure.

Drivetrain reinforcement with **Richmond Gear 6-speed manual transmission** (Tremec TKO-600) paired with a **McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 10.5")** and **Hurst Competition/Plus shifter**. Rear end upgraded to a **Moser 12-bolt posi-traction differential** with 4.10:1 gearing and **Strange Engineering axles**.
estetica: Full **Hurst/Olds-specific widebody conversion** using **YearOne reproduction quarter panels** and **Fiberglass Trends front fenders** to accommodate 18x10" **BBS RS-GT wheels** (ET15 offset) with **Nitto NT05R 295/40R18 tires**.

Custom **Hurst Gold and Black paint scheme** with **House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red base** and **PPG Black accent stripes**, clear-coated with **3M Scotchgard Pro Series** for UV protection. Badging includes **OEM Hurst/Olds emblems (reproduction by Classic Industries)** and **Billet Specialties script valve covers**.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro SRD front seats (cloth/vinyl combo)** wrapped in **Hurst Gold and Black upholstery (reproduction by Legendary Auto Interiors)**, **Grant GT steering wheel (14" diameter)**, and **AutoMeter Pro-Comp gauges (boost, oil pressure, fuel level)** in a **custom center console pod**.
